title: Koala Calls Sabo
description: Pages 1–5 focus on koala calls sabo, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Sabo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fujitora, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as sabo abandons restraint to protect Luffy, clashing with Fujitora as the final Dressrosa battle gathers everyone around the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Hello, can you hear me? Sabo-kun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I hear ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're supposed to be maintain- ing your position!!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: You can't just up and go brawling with a marine Admiral just because you feel like it!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Are you planning to drag the revolutionary army into a war?!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: My little brother's in trouble, all that other shit doesn't concern me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It so does!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OWW!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wwef he shedd...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: We are all birds of a feather. Even the Marines in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Can't become heroes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's absurd ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What if someone finds out that's what you really think?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well, I could tell them I've been... compromised...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's quite the gamble...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hehe...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I hope you have good luck...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You understand?! Are you even listening?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ... hmmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: DAMNIT!! The ones that everyone gets pissed at for your selfish- mess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Are me and hack!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Former "King's Plateau"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: WHAT?! DIDN'T YOU COME HERE FOR OUR HEADS?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: If we did that...we'd all lose!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: By manipulating King Riku for just one night, Doflamingo was able to turn the entire populace against King Riku and they've held that grudge against him these past 10 years...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Praise the "pirate King"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: After realizing the truth...All we really want is to be saved from His ludicrous game!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: We don't even know what we're doing any- more!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: What's happened to this country ...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Save us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: KING RIKU...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What should we dooo....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: "If you tell us to fight... how

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: We'll pick up weapons and fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: How about we try waiting just a bit longer?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: ...eh? Wait...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: It seems at some point, I too started to believe in Luffy-kun and. His friends' victory...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: If you're choosing death ...then you wouldn't miss out on anything by waiting a little while....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: I will not allow DressRosa, once a symbol of peace, to go to war...

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: ...Ah! Marine Admiral

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: FUJI- TORA?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ClANG... ROLL...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm going all- in on "straw hat"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: My LORD, King Riku....!! I, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Am making the same "bet" as you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: A certain Royal Palace Plateau-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: "The fourth level"--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: "Royal Palace" Top Floor--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: HAAH ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: HAAY ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: How'd you like that one, you bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: peh!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Look!! We've yet to deal anything but superficial wounds!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: That plan just now isn't going to work a second time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Law..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: I know everything about your ability!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Because we originally wanted the "ope ope no mi"... a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: SPLISH SPLASH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: And its power!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: WhA??!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: "Radio knife" creates a different kind of incision than a normal ampula- lion.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: "In just a few minutes!! Regardless of any kind of measure or "ability" you have at your disposal...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: You will be unable to REATTACH YOUR BODY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Ehhh~!? crap, I'm in trouble!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: My noose is ruunning ..!!!!

summary: Koala Calls Sabo develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Sabo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Fujitora, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
